entry.title: Unable to Reverse Unplanned Depreciation Across Fiscal Years
entry.content:
Hi Team,For entity SE63, we cannot execute ordinary depreciation because unplanned depreciation was posted in the past. To continue processing depreciation correctly, those historical unplanned depreciation postings must first be reversed.

However, when attempting to reverse the posting, SAP does not allow the reversal because the original posting belongs to fiscal year 2024, while the reversal would be posted in fiscal year 2026.

entry.title: SEP1 problem with unplanned depreciation
entry.content:
Hi Team,For entity SE63, we cannot execute ordinary depreciation because unplanned depreciation was posted in the past. To continue processing depreciation correctly, those historical unplanned depreciation postings must first be reversed.

However, when attempting to reverse the posting, SAP does not allow the reversal because the original posting belongs to fiscal year 2024, while the reversal would be posted in fiscal year 2026.

entry.title: Asset posting
entry.content:
Hi Team,

The user wants to post the asset in the 2 transaction type that is 920 and Z28, it should spitting of the amount two different transaction type.

Please guide on this.

entry.title: F3697 Gebuchter Betrag weicht vom rechnerischen Betrag ab
entry.content: Interne Leistungsverrechnung wurde erfasst über F3697. Der gebuchte Betrag weicht vom rechnerischen Betrag ab.

entry.title: Define a cost element category for account 5401001005 (controlling area PVM)
entry.content:
We are posting the Manua JV via F-02 t code and  getting error message : 

Define a cost element category for account 5401001005 (controlling area PVM)

Message No. KI280

Diagnosis

Account 5401001005 is a profit and loss account. You assigned it to an object in cost accounting (for example, a cost center, order, project, or profitability segment).

In this case, a cost element category must exist for account 5401001005 in the determined controlling area PVM.
See transaction FS00, "Control Data" area.

 

Procedure

Define a cost element category for account 5401001005 and post again or delete the auxiliary account assignment to objects in cost accounting.

With profitability segment assignment, the error message is only displayed when account-based profitability analysis is activated. Here it may be a good idea to suppress the error message and ignore the account assignment during the posting. This is particularly the case when the posting is not only relevant for the result from the usual busin

entry.title: Error KOB1
entry.content:
Hi team,

launching the KOB1 transaction in the background and downloading it to Excel, we noticed that the Excel file does not have the same number of rows as the system (and therefore also the result).

More detail in attachment.

Kind regards

entry.title: Asset classes for dep areas 01, 02, and 15 are active in Z01, Z03, and Z04 system except Z02 system.
entry.content:
There are 17 asset classes for which depreciation areas 01, 02, and 15 are active for company code 201 in the Z01, Z03, and Z04 systems, but not in the Z02 system. Please find the list of these asset classes. 

AC010100AC021000AC030000AC030070AC050000AC060000AC060010AC070000AC090000AC090001AC090010AC090011AC090020AC100000AC110000AC120000AC160000

We now need to activate depreciation area

entry.title: BTE 1820 custom code is not triggering during payment run despite FIBF activation
entry.content: I am implementing a duplicate vendor credit card check under BTE event 1820 with custom code, but the debugger is not stopping, and FIBF activation is in place. The payment run job F110-20260624-TEST0 shows BTE 1820 as active, but my custom code does not seem to be executed during the process.

entry.title: KSII - Maessage KD301
entry.content:
Currently, the client confirms activities in seconds, however the activity types master data are as hours. Regarding the conversion of entries for cost valuation is being converted and valued correctly.

The issue is when we are using the actual activities quantities like base to allocate costs cycles and actual cost rate, the SAP don’t find the activities quantities by hours confirmed to allocation determination.

Cost center CTR 1000/1001100001, cost element 41202001: Tracing factor for splitting is zero

Message No. KD301

Diagnosis

The plan/actual costs for cost element 41202001 cannot be settled to the CO activities for period 5 according to assignment rule MOD in cost center CTR 1000/1001100001 because the tracing factor in plan and in actual is zero.

System Response

The plan/actual costs for cost element 41202001 are split according to the equivalence numbers for the activity types.

Procedure

Check assignment MOD and your splitting rule.

entry.title: DMEE Payment file format
entry.content:
Hello All,

In our S4 HANA SAP System, we are trying to implement pain.001.001.09 payment file format.

We are currently using pain001.001.03 file format with unstructured address field.

Can you please help identify key differences in v 03 and v09 file format and what SAP Notes are required to be implemented for v09 to be available in system.

Thanks

Lekha

entry.title: Some assets are showing zero value in asset master record.
entry.content:
Unable to retire fully depreciated assets 40580 and 40584 due to depreciation key YLIN scrap value configuration.

Unable to retire fully depreciated assets 40580 and 40584 due to depreciation key YLIN scrap value configuration.

We require guidance on the correct asset accounting configuration.

Company code: DDN and Assets: 40580 & 40584

Both assets are assigned Depreciation Key YLIN in Depreciation Area 06(MGAAP).

SAP previously confirmed that Depreciation Key YLIN is configured with a 5% scrap value and that both assets are already fully depreciated with Net Book Value =0. Because of this configuration, retirement by scrapping fails.

We would like guidance on the correct configuration approach to retire these assets without affecting other assets that use the same depreciation key. 

Kindly advise:

  1. Whether the scrap value percentage should be temporarily removed from depreciation key YLIN.
  2. Whether a new depreciation key should be created for fully depreciated assets.
  3. What is the SAP-recommended approach to retire these assets while maintaining configuration consistency.

entry.title: Ungroup invoices to be paid for the same vendor in DMEE
entry.content:
I would like to send vendor invoices to the bank for factoring as payment file (SEPA format) and the process is working, but in case if If I have  one vendor w 2 invoices and w 2 separate due dates, DMEE is grouping the two invoices and only one due date appears in the file. 

Due date is in Tag which appears only once in the file. Expectation is that file will be created as it would be two difference vendors.

I have tried different settings in fbzp and DMEE sorting, but w/o success.

entry.title: Error KOB1
entry.content:
Hi team,

launching the KOB1 transaction in the background and downloading it to Excel, we noticed that the Excel file does not have the same number of rows as the system (and therefore also the result).

More detail in attachment.

Kind regards

entry.title: to enable the mass upload functionality embedded in transaction KP26.
entry.content:
to enable the mass upload functionality embedded in transaction KP26. This goes in within transaction KP26 in settings > EXTRA > EXCEL PLANNING > UPLOAD.

Could you please advise standard configuration and upload file for embedded mass upload functionality in transaction KP26.

entry.title: Error while changing depreciation start date in asset master
entry.content:
Getting error - fiscal year 2025 is already closed in financial accounting.

We have asset acquired in FY26 and trying to change depreciation start date and getting error. we have no posting in FY2025 for the asse.

entry.title: Retired asset calculates depreciation till useful life end
entry.content: Legacy asset retired but migrated since it is current year retirement: system calculates depreciation till the useful life end despite retiement

entry.title: 勘定 827130減価償却費 に CO 対象への割当が必要です
entry.content: 固定資産のマスタ設定に原価センタ設定済み、AO90の勘定科目割り当ても実施したが、償却AFABを実行する時に「勘定 827130 に CO 対象への割当が必要です」エラーが発生しました。

entry.title: KT_INC10197128_Line Item Display Not Enabled for GL 21180100 in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,
We would like to seek your guidance regarding the Line Item Display configuration for GL Account 21180100 in our S/4HANA environment.
The business team observed, through a comparison in SE16N, that Line Item Display is enabled for other GL accounts, whereas it is not enabled for GL Account 21180100 across multiple company codes. Based on this comparison, the business has requested that Line Item Display be enabled for this GL account.
During our analysis, we found that Line Item Display is currently not enabled for GL Account 21180100. We also reviewed the configuration and observed the following:
The GL account is configured as a Clearing Balance Account and is assigned in the Document Splitting configuration.
As per SAP standard configuration, Line Item Display/Open Item Management is not required for this GL account because no direct postings are made to it. The system automatically derives the postings during document splitting.
In our ECC system, there was an option to activate or deactivate Line Item Display for this account. During the SPS upgrade, Open Item Management was deactivated for this GL account to avoid document posting errors.
Since this account has now been migrated to the S/4HANA e

entry.title: Which document number or what is important to jump to the original document in CJI3 or KSB1N?
entry.content:
Hi team,

we have two layouts in place in transaction CJI3N. We are referring to note:

2445603 - Error message KB420 in transaction KSB1N or CJI3N - SAP for Me

If we are clicking on the line items in the layout /TCO_01, we are jumping to the original document (invoice document), what we want. 

If we are taking another layout /DSW, we are jumping to the Controlling document.

Which document number or what we should enter in the layout, that we always jump to the original document?

Why is this the case, but the document number (Ref. doc. number) is in both cases there.

Thank you and BR Isabella

entry.title: What is important (doc. number) in the layout to jump to the original document in CJI3N or KSB1N?
entry.content:
Hi team,

we have two layouts in place in transaction CJI3N. We are referring to note:

2445603 - Error message KB420 in transaction KSB1N or CJI3N - SAP for Me

If we are clicking on the line items in the layout /TCO_01, we are jumping to the original document (invoice document), what we want. 

If we are taking another layout /DSW, we are jumping to the Controlling document.

Which document number or what we should enter in the layout, that we always jump to the original document?

Why is this the case, but the document number (Ref. doc. number) is in both cases there.

Thank you and BR Isabella
